name: 09-multi-component-one-sidecar
description: Single scan with two MCP components (npm @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem + pypi mcp-server-git), one shared AIBOM sidecar document that carries per-component capability sets, both components referencing the same sidecar via externalReferences.
notes: Proves schema-rule's one-sidecar-per-scan commitment. Components[] in both the CDX and the sidecar are sorted lex by bom-ref: pkg:npm/... < pkg:pypi/... (n < p). Attestation subject[] is also sorted lex by name: fixture-09.aibom.json < fixture-09.cdx.json (a < c). Component-level anchors inside the sidecar map evidence back to CycloneDX bom-ref values; each component's capabilities block is self-contained.
